title: Current Good Manufacturing Practice (cGMP) for Finished Pharmaceuticals
description: 21 CFR Parts 210 and 211 — the foundational US regulations governing pharmaceutical manufacturing quality systems, facilities, equipment, and documentation.

title: Guidance for Industry: Chemistry, Manufacturing, and Controls for Human Gene Therapy
description: FDA guidance on CMC requirements for human gene therapy investigational new drug (IND) applications, covering product characterization and manufacturing controls.

title: Guidance: Testing of Retroviral Vector-Based Human Gene Therapy Products
description: Recommendations for testing retroviral and lentiviral vector-based gene therapy products for replication competent retrovirus (RCR) and replication competent lentivirus (RCL).

title: Guidance for Industry: Potency Tests for Cellular and Gene Therapy Products
description: FDA recommendations for development and validation of potency assays for cellular and gene therapy products, including matrix approaches.

title: Aseptic Processing Guidance for Industry
description: Comprehensive FDA guidance on aseptic processing for sterile pharmaceutical products, covering facility design, environmental monitoring, personnel, and process simulation.

title: EudraLex Volume 4 — EU GMP Guidelines
description: The complete EU GMP compendium (EudraLex Vol 4), covering Parts I, II, III and all Annexes including Annex 1 (Sterile Manufacture) and Annex 2 (ATMPs).

title: Annex 1 — Manufacture of Sterile Medicinal Products
description: The revised 2022 Annex 1 to EU GMP — the global benchmark for sterile manufacturing, introducing the Contamination Control Strategy (CCS) concept.

title: Annex 2 — Manufacture of Biological Active Substances and Medicinal Products
description: EU GMP Annex 2 covering biological active substances including cells, tissues, ATMPs, and gene therapy products.

title: Guideline on Human Cell-Based Medicinal Products
description: EMA scientific guideline on quality, non-clinical, and clinical requirements for human cell-based medicinal products including stem cells and CAR-T.

title: MHRA GMP Inspectorate Guidance: ATMPs
description: MHRA guidance on GMP compliance expectations for Advanced Therapy Medicinal Products (ATMPs) including CAR-T, gene therapy, and tissue-engineered products.

title: Rules and Guidance for Pharmaceutical Manufacturers and Distributors (Orange Guide)
description: The UK's definitive GMP guide (post-Brexit) — the Orange Guide — covering all aspects of pharmaceutical manufacturing quality for the UK market.

title: National Guidelines for Stem Cell Research and Therapy
description: ICMR/DBT national guidelines governing stem cell research, banking, and clinical application in India — the primary regulatory framework for cell therapy at Indian institutions.

title: New Drugs and Clinical Trials Rules 2019
description: India's primary regulatory rules for new drugs, biological products, and clinical trials — successor to Schedule Y. Governs approval pathways for ATMPs in India.

title: WHO Good Manufacturing Practices for Pharmaceutical Products
description: WHO core GMP guidelines (TRS 986, Annex 2) — the international reference standard used by regulatory authorities in over 150 countries.

title: WHO Guidelines on Cell Culture Infectious Disease Considerations for Biologically-Derived Products
description: WHO technical guidance on adventitious agent testing and viral safety for biologically-derived products including cell therapy.

title: PIC/S Guide to Good Manufacturing Practice for Medicinal Products
description: PIC/S PE 009 — harmonized GMP guide adopted by 56 participating authorities including TGA, Health Canada, PMDA, and CDSCO. Aligned with EU GMP.

title: Rules and Guidance for Pharmaceutical Manufacturers and Distributors (Orange Guide) 2022
description: The UK's primary GMP reference post-Brexit — the Orange Guide. Covers manufacturing authorisation, QP responsibilities, premises, equipment, documentation, production, QC, outsourced activities, and complaints/recalls.

title: MHRA Guidance: Good Manufacturing Practice for ATMPs
description: MHRA GMP expectations for Advanced Therapy Medicinal Products including CAR-T, gene therapy vectors, and tissue-engineered products. Covers starting materials, manufacturing controls, release testing, and QP certification.

title: MHRA Guidance: Specials Manufacturers — ATMPs Exempt from ATMP Regulation
description: MHRA guidance on the hospital exemption for ATMPs prepared on a non-routine basis. Relevant for academic CGT units preparing early-phase investigational products outside the full ATMP marketing authorisation route.

title: MHRA Guidance: Aseptic Preparation — NHS and Non-Commercial Manufacture
description: MHRA guidance on aseptic preparation in NHS hospital units and non-commercial settings, covering cleanroom standards, environmental monitoring, APS/media fill requirements, and personnel qualification for cell therapy contexts.

title: MHRA GMP Data Integrity Guidance and Definitions
description: MHRA's definitive data integrity guidance — ALCOA+ principles, audit trail expectations, paper and electronic records management, hybrid systems, and GMP compliance expectations for UK-licensed manufacturers.

title: EU GMP Annex 15 — Qualification and Validation
description: EU GMP Annex 15 on qualification of equipment/facilities and validation of processes, cleaning, and computerised systems. Covers DQ/IQ/OQ/PQ lifecycle, change control, revalidation, and concurrent validation.

title: EU GMP Chapter 6 — Quality Control
description: EU GMP Chapter 6 covering QC laboratory requirements including personnel, premises, documentation, sampling, testing, out-of-specification handling, and stability programmes. Applicable to CGT product release testing.

title: EMA CAT Reflection Paper on Stem Cell-Based Medicinal Products
description: EMA Committee for Advanced Therapies (CAT) reflection paper on quality, safety, and efficacy issues for stem cell-based ATMPs including iPSC-derived products, MSCs, and HSCs.

title: EMA Guideline on Follow-Up of Patients Administered with Gene Therapy Medicinal Products
description: EMA guideline on long-term safety follow-up programmes for gene therapy clinical trial and post-marketing patients in the EU. Covers duration, endpoints, and vector integration site monitoring.

title: EU GMP Annex 4 — Manufacture of Veterinary Medicinal Products Other Than Immunologicals
description: EU GMP Annex 4 covering manufacture of veterinary products — useful cross-reference for CGT manufacturers producing both human and veterinary biological products in shared or adjacent facilities.

title: Japanese Pharmacopoeia GMP — Ministerial Ordinance 179
description: Japan's primary GMP regulation (MO 179) governing manufacturing and quality control of pharmaceuticals and biological products. Harmonised with ICH Q10 pharmaceutical quality system requirements.

title: Act on the Safety of Regenerative Medicine (ASRM) 2014
description: Japan's landmark legislation for regenerative medicine including cell therapies, gene therapies, and tissue-engineered products. Establishes a risk-based approval system with conditional/time-limited approval for CGT products.

title: PMDA Guidance on Quality and Safety of Cellular and Tissue-Based Products
description: PMDA guidance on quality characterisation, manufacturing controls, and safety testing for cell-based and tissue-engineered medicinal products for the Japanese market.

title: Japan GMP Annex on Aseptic Processing — MHLW Notification
description: MHLW guidance on aseptic manufacturing requirements in Japan including cleanroom ISO classification, environmental monitoring, gowning, APS design, and sterility assurance for biological and CGT products.

title: TGA Code of GMP for Human Blood and Blood Components, Human Tissues and Human Cellular Therapy Products
description: TGA-specific GMP code for biological therapeutic goods including blood, tissues, and cell therapy products manufactured or supplied in Australia. Supplements PIC/S PE 009 with Australian-specific requirements.

title: TGA Guidance: Regulation of Biologicals — Cell and Gene Therapy Products
description: TGA guidance on the regulatory pathway for biological medicines including cell therapies, gene therapies, and ATMPs in Australia. Covers Class 1–4 biologicals framework, manufacturing licence, and clinical trial notification.

title: TGA GMP Clearance for Overseas Manufacturers
description: TGA framework for assessing GMP compliance of overseas manufacturers supplying therapeutic goods to Australia. Relevant for Indian CGT manufacturers seeking TGA GMP clearance.

title: Health Canada — Good Manufacturing Practices Guide for Drug Products (GUI-0001)
description: Health Canada's primary GMP guide GUI-0001 for finished drug products. PIC/S-aligned. Covers premises, equipment, personnel, sanitation, raw materials, manufacturing operations, QC, and stability.

title: Health Canada Guidance: Cell Therapy Products — Chemistry and Manufacturing
description: Health Canada guidance on CMC requirements for cell therapy products (CTP) seeking clinical trial or market authorisation in Canada. Covers cell characterisation, manufacturing process, release specifications, and comparability.

title: Health Canada Guidance: Gene Therapy Products — Clinical Trials
description: Health Canada guidance on filing Clinical Trial Applications (CTAs) for gene therapy products including viral vectors and ex vivo gene-modified cell therapies. Covers quality, preclinical, and early clinical requirements.

title: Health Canada GUI-0119 — Cleanroom and Environmental Control for Sterile Drug Products
description: Health Canada guidance on cleanroom classification, HVAC design, environmental monitoring, and aseptic process simulation for sterile drug product manufacturers. PIC/S Annex 1 aligned.

title: China GMP for Pharmaceutical Products (2010 Revision)
description: China's national GMP regulation issued by NMPA (formerly CFDA). Covers facilities, equipment, personnel, materials, production management, QC, validation, and documentation for pharmaceutical manufacturers in China.

title: NMPA Technical Guidelines for Gene Therapy Products
description: NMPA (China) technical guidelines for gene therapy product development covering CMC, preclinical, and clinical requirements. Applicable to AAV, lentiviral vector, and ex vivo CGT products seeking approval in China.

title: NMPA Guidelines for CAR-T Cell Therapy Products
description: China NMPA-specific guidelines for CAR-T cell therapy product development, manufacturing, and clinical evaluation. Covers apheresis, vector production, cell expansion, release, and post-marketing requirements.

title: HSA Guide on Good Manufacturing Practice
description: Health Sciences Authority Singapore GMP guide for pharmaceutical manufacturers. PIC/S member — aligned with PIC/S PE 009. Covers all aspects of GMP for manufacturers seeking HSA manufacturing licence.

title: HSA Guidance: Regulatory Framework for Cell, Tissue and Gene Therapy Products
description: HSA Singapore regulatory pathway for cell, tissue, and gene therapy (CTGTP) products. Covers product classification, manufacturing licence requirements, clinical trial notification, and market authorisation.

title: HSA Guidance on Aseptic Processing and Environmental Monitoring
description: HSA Singapore guidance on aseptic manufacturing for biological and sterile products. Covers ISO cleanroom classification, environmental monitoring programme design, gowning qualification, and APS frequency.

title: Korea GMP Regulations for Pharmaceuticals — MFDS Notification
description: Ministry of Food and Drug Safety (MFDS) GMP regulations for pharmaceutical manufacturers in South Korea. ICH Q10 and PIC/S aligned. Covers QMS, facilities, equipment, materials, production, and QC.

title: MFDS Guidelines for Advanced Biopharmaceuticals — Cell Therapy and Gene Therapy
description: South Korea MFDS guidance on quality, non-clinical, and clinical requirements for advanced biopharmaceuticals including cell therapy and gene therapy products. Covers CAR-T, viral vectors, and iPSC-derived products.

title: MFDS Guidance on GMP for Advanced Biopharmaceutical Products
description: MFDS GMP-specific guidance for advanced biopharmaceutical manufacturing facilities in South Korea. Covers cleanroom standards, equipment qualification, cell culture QC, viral safety, and batch release for CGT products.

title: ANVISA RDC 301/2019 — Good Manufacturing Practices for Medicines
description: Brazil's primary GMP resolution RDC 301/2019 covering all aspects of pharmaceutical manufacturing quality for the Brazilian market. PIC/S-aligned framework covering facilities, processes, documentation, and QC.

title: ANVISA RDC 204/2017 — Good Manufacturing Practice for Cell Therapy Products
description: Brazil's specific GMP regulation for cell therapy products including MSCs, lymphocytes, and dendritic cells. Covers donor testing, processing, cryopreservation, QC, and release for cell-based medicinal products.

title: ANVISA RDC 67/2007 — Good Manufacturing Practices for Compounded Preparations
description: ANVISA guidance on aseptic preparation and compounding in Brazil. Covers cleanroom requirements, personnel, equipment, environmental monitoring, and sterility assurance applicable to hospital-based cell therapy preparation.

title: Swissmedic GMP Guidance for Medicinal Products
description: Swissmedic GMP requirements for pharmaceutical manufacturers in Switzerland. EU GMP-aligned as Switzerland maintains bilateral agreements. Covers all aspects of manufacturing quality for Swiss market authorisation.

title: Swissmedic Guidance on ATMPs — Classification and Authorisation
description: Swissmedic guidance on ATMP product classification, manufacturing licence requirements, and market authorisation in Switzerland for cell therapies, gene therapies, and tissue-engineered products.

title: SAHPRA GMP Guide for Manufacturers of Medicines
description: South African Health Products Regulatory Authority GMP guide based on WHO and PIC/S standards. Covers facility, equipment, personnel, documentation, and QC requirements for South African medicine manufacturers.

title: SAHPRA Guidance on Biological Medicines including Cell and Gene Therapy Products
description: SAHPRA regulatory guidance on biological medicines and advanced therapies in South Africa. Covers registration pathway, clinical trial authorisation, and GMP compliance expectations for CGT products.

title: SFDA Good Manufacturing Practice Requirements for Pharmaceutical Products
description: Saudi Food and Drug Authority GMP requirements for pharmaceutical manufacturers. WHO and PIC/S aligned. Covers facilities, equipment, personnel qualification, documentation, production, and QC for Saudi market.

title: SFDA Regulatory Framework for Advanced Therapies and Biotechnology Products
description: SFDA guidance on the registration and manufacturing requirements for advanced therapy products and biotechnology medicines in Saudi Arabia, including cell therapies and gene therapy products.

title: Malaysia GMP Guide for Pharmaceutical Products
description: National Pharmaceutical Regulatory Agency (NPRA) Malaysia GMP guide. WHO and PIC/S aligned. Covers all aspects of pharmaceutical manufacturing quality for products registered with NPRA.

title: NPRA Malaysia Guidance on Cell and Gene Therapy Products
description: NPRA Malaysia regulatory guidance on cell and gene therapy products covering product classification, clinical trial authorisation, manufacturing requirements, and market registration pathway.

title: Medsafe New Zealand Code of Good Manufacturing Practice
description: Medsafe New Zealand GMP code for pharmaceutical and biological manufacturers. TGA-aligned as NZ-Australia mutual recognition partners. Covers all aspects of GMP for New Zealand-licensed manufacturers.

title: Medsafe Guidance on Biological Medicines and Cell Therapy Products
description: Medsafe guidance on the regulatory pathway for biological medicines including cell therapies in New Zealand. Covers consent to supply, clinical trial authorisation, and import requirements for CGT products.

title: WHO Technical Report Series 986 — Good Manufacturing Practices for Pharmaceutical Products: Main Principles
description: WHO TRS 986 Annex 2 — the core WHO GMP text adopted as the primary GMP standard by regulatory authorities in over 150 countries. Covers all aspects of pharmaceutical manufacturing from premises to QC.

title: WHO TRS 961 Annex 6 — GMP for Sterile Pharmaceutical Products
description: WHO GMP guidance for sterile pharmaceutical products. Covers cleanroom classification, environmental monitoring, APS/media fill, gowning, personnel, and sterility assurance — the reference standard for sterile manufacture in developing countries.

title: WHO Guidelines on Evaluation of Similar Biotherapeutic Products (SBPs)
description: WHO guidance on the development and evaluation of biosimilar/similar biotherapeutic products. Reference framework used in India, Brazil, and other developing-country markets for biological comparability assessments.

title: WHO TRS 978 Annex 2 — Recommendations for the Evaluation of Animal Cell Cultures
description: WHO recommendations for characterisation and quality control of animal cell cultures used in biological product manufacture including adventitious agent testing, mycoplasma, and cell bank qualification.

title: WHO TRS 1019 Annex 3 — Good Manufacturing Practices for Biological Products
description: WHO GMP guidance specifically for biological products including vaccines, blood products, and cell-based medicines. Covers seed lot systems, cell banks, in-process testing, and viral safety — the international baseline for biological GMP.

title: PIC/S PE 009-16 — Guide to Good Manufacturing Practice for Medicinal Products (Parts I and II)
description: PIC/S PE 009 — the harmonised GMP guide adopted by 56 participating authorities worldwide including TGA, Health Canada, PMDA, CDSCO, and Swissmedic. Parts I and II are essentially identical to EU GMP EudraLex Vol 4.

title: PIC/S PI 011 — Guidance on Parametric Release
description: PIC/S guidance on parametric release for terminally sterilised pharmaceutical products. Defines sterility assurance level (SAL) requirements and manufacturing process controls needed to replace end-product sterility testing.

title: PIC/S PI 041 — Draft Guidance on Good Manufacturing Practice for ATMPs
description: PIC/S draft guidance on GMP for advanced therapy medicinal products. Covers starting material controls, manufacturing process, quality control, release testing, distribution, and inspection expectations for ATMPs across PIC/S member countries.
